overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit gothic mansion library with ornate wood paneling and floor-to-ceiling bookshelves. The player character walks past a mysterious seated figure wearing a plague doctor mask, descends a wooden staircase, and explores upper-level corridors filled with paintings, tapestries, and artifacts before reaching a balcony overlooking the lower library.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit gothic library with warm amber lighting from wall sconces. Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves line the walls, and a large ornate rug covers the floor. The camera approaches a wooden desk where a figure wearing a bird-like mask sits hunched over papers, with tall iron-grilled windows visible behind them.

events.description: leaving the upper library and descending a wooden staircase to the lower level
entering a small antechamber with an upright piano and red rug

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow wooden staircase with paneled walls, then entering a small room with a piano

entered.detail: narrow wooden staircase with carved balustrade descending to lower level
dark wooden upright piano against the wall
red patterned rug in the small transition room

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a narrow wooden staircase with paneled walls, leaving the upper library behind. At the bottom, it enters a small antechamber containing an upright piano and a red rug before continuing into the lower corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with taxidermy displays and wall tapestries

green glass banker's lamp on the side table
large wall tapestry depicting a deer in a forest setting
glass display case containing busts and artifacts

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a long corridor with bookshelves on the left and a railing overlooking the lower level on the right. It passes a green banker's lamp on a side table and a large tapestry depicting a deer in a forest. Display cases with busts line the walls, and an ornate chandelier hangs from the ceiling.

events.description: emerging onto a balcony with a view of the lower library floor and distant chandelier
approaching an arched doorway leading to stairs descending to the lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along a balcony overlooking the lower library, observing the tall bookshelves below, then approaching a doorway with descending stairs

entered.detail: wooden balustrade railing overlooking the lower library floor
view of the lower level with bookshelves and chandelier visible below
arched wooden doorway leading to a staircase descending further

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a balcony with a view of the lower library level below, showing the chandelier and bookshelves from above. It continues along the balcony, passing framed paintings on the walls, and approaches an arched doorway that leads to stairs descending further into the mansion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit gothic library that transitions from an intimate study into a sprawling, artifact-filled corridor. It begins by gliding across an ornate rug toward a figure in a bird-like mask hunched over a wooden desk beneath tall iron-grilled windows. As the camera moves past the desk, it descends a narrow wooden staircase with paneled walls, passing through a small antechamber featuring an upright piano and a red rug. The scene then expands into a long corridor, moving past a green banker's lamp and a large forest tapestry while the view opens up to a railing overlooking the lower level. Finally, the camera drifts past display cases of busts under the glow of an ornate chandelier, completing the journey through the mansion's scholarly halls.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated vantage point overlooking the library toward a descending path deeper into the mansion. It begins by emerging onto a balcony, providing a sweeping view of the lower library level with its ornate chandelier and towering bookshelves. As the camera glides along the balcony, the perspective shifts from the open void of the hall to the intimate detail of framed paintings lining the walls. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches an arched doorway, finally turning toward the stairs that lead away from the balcony and down into the interior of the estate.
